export type CanvasLayerZOrder = 'below-cells' | 'below-content' | 'above-content' | 'above-selection' | 'overlay'
export type DecorationAnimationPreset = 'none' | 'fade-in' | 'fade-out' | 'pulse' | 'shimmer' | 'flash'
export type DecorationKind = 'fill' | 'border' | 'badge' | 'underline' | 'stripe' | 'glow'
export type DimensionInfo = RowDimensionInfo | ColDimensionInfo
export type InteractiveElementInfo = { readonly id: string; readonly type: 'filter-button'; readonly bounds: InteractiveElementBounds; readonly metadata: FilterButtonElementMetadata; } | { readonly id ...
export type InteractiveElementType = 'filter-button' | 'checkbox' | 'comment-indicator' | 'validation-dropdown' | 'sparkline-edit' | 'hyperlink'
export type InvalidationReason = 'data-change' | 'geometry-change' | 'selection-change' | 'theme-change' | 'full' | 'object-change' | 'scroll' | 'resize'
export type InvalidationTarget = CellInvalidationTarget | RangeInvalidationTarget
export type ObjectHitRegionType = 'body' | 'border' | 'rotation' | 'resize-nw' | 'resize-n' | 'resize-ne' | 'resize-e' | 'resize-se' | 'resize-s' | 'resize-sw' | 'resize-w' | 'warp-adjust'
export type OverlayAnchor = { type: 'cell'; row: number; col: number; } | { type: 'range'; startRow: number; startCol: number; endRow: number; endCol: number; } | { type: 'viewport-point'; x: number;  ...
export type OverlayPlacement = 'top' | 'bottom' | 'left' | 'right' | 'top-start' | 'top-end' | 'bottom-start' | 'bottom-end'
export type SheetAnchor = CellAddress | RangeAddress
export type SheetHitResult = SheetHitCell | SheetHitMergedCellAnchor | SheetHitColumnHeader | SheetHitRowHeader | SheetHitColumnResizeHandle | SheetHitRowResizeHandle | SheetHitHiddenColumnBoundary |  ...

export type SheetViewCustomRenderer = (frame: SheetViewCustomRenderFrame) => void
export type SheetViewDataSourceKey = string
export type SheetViewDataSources = Record<string, unknown>
